pseudocode:
FLOW Microflow: ExcelImporter.IVK_Column_Save
NODES=55; EDGES=68
1. START
2. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable Valid=true
3. DECISION Datasource expression=$Column/DataSource
4. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=(empty)
  5. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
  6. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Valid=false
  7. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
  8. DECISION has col number? expression=$Column/ColNumber != empty
  9. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    10. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
    11. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Valid=false
    12. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
    13. DECISION has text? expression=$Column/Text != empty and $Column/Text != ''
    14. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
      15. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
      16. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Valid=false
      17. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
      18. DECISION mapping type expression=$Column/MappingType
      19. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=(empty)
        20. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
        21. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Valid=false
        22. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        23. DECISION valid? expression=$Valid
        24. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
          25. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.BCo_Column -> commitResult
          26. DECISION valid? expression=$commitResult
          27. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
            28. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Column (refreshInClient=true)
            29. ACTION CloseFormAction: close page
            30. END
          31. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
            32. END
        33. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
          34. END
      35. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=Attribute
        36. DECISION has key? expression=$Column/IsKey != empty
        37. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
          38. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
          39. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Valid=false
          40. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
          41. DECISION has attribute? expression=$Column/ExcelImporter.Column_MxObjectMember != empty
          42. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
            43. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
            44. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Valid=false
            45. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
            46. REF ExclusiveMerge
          47. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
            48. REF ExclusiveMerge
        49. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
          50. REF ExclusiveMerge
      51. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=DoNotUse
        52. REF ExclusiveMerge
      53. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=Reference
        54. DECISION has ref key? expression=$Column/IsReferenceKey != empty
        55. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
          56. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
          57. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Valid=false
          58. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
          59. DECISION has ref attribute? expression=$Column/ExcelImporter.Column_MxObjectMember_Reference != empty
          60. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
            61. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
            62. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Valid=false
            63. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
            64. DECISION has reference? expression=$Column/ExcelImporter.Column_MxObjectReference != empty
            65. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
              66. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
              67. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Valid=false
              68. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
              69. DECISION has ref object? expression=$Column/ExcelImporter.Column_MxObjectType_Reference != empty
              70. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
                71. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
                72. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Valid=false
                73. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
                74. REF ExclusiveMerge
              75. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
                76. REF ExclusiveMerge
            77. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
              78. REF ExclusiveMerge
          79. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
            80. REF ExclusiveMerge
        81. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
          82. REF ExclusiveMerge
    83. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
      84. REF ExclusiveMerge
  85. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    86. REF ExclusiveMerge
87. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=CellValue
  88. REF ExclusiveMerge
89. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=DocumentPropertySheetNr
  90. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
  91. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Column (Text=getCaption( $Column/DataSource ); refreshInClient=false)
  92. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
  93. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Column (IsKey=ExcelImporter.YesNo.No, IsReferenceKey=ExcelImporter.ReferenceKeyType.NoKey, ColNumber=999; refreshInClient=false)
  94. REF ExclusiveMerge
95. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=StaticValue
  96. REF ExclusiveMerge
97. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=DocumentPropertyRowNr
  98. REF ExclusiveMerge
